profile.name: Jyothi Sree
profile.title: Senior Data Engineer
profile.bio: Senior Data Engineer with 6+ years building large-scale batch and streaming pipelines across AWS, Azure, GCP, Snowflake, and Databricks, with a track record of cutting runtime, improving data quality, and delivering governed analytics-ready datasets for regulated finance and healthcare environments.
